productDisplayName: Timex Men Helix-Pop Black Dial Watch
description: Case Style: Analog watch with a round case that has a stainless steel backDial Style: Dial with three concentric circles, black in the centre with green and steel coloured hands, orange circle around the black with black coloured hour hands and black circle around the orange with green colour hour marksFeatures: Screw to reset timeStrap Style: Black leather strap with green stitched detail along the edge and tang clasp, has holes to customise fitWater resistantWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects only
